releaseNotes:
Agent Event Log v2 and tool safety kernel release.

Highlights:
- Added AgentEvent event log for model calls, protocol repairs, tool requests, approvals, tool results, errors, resume, pause, and completion
- Added ToolProtocolGuard to repair or reject invalid provider-bound tool message structures before model calls
- Added semantic tool safety assessment for terminal, PowerShell, Git, file, HTTP, browser, search, and MCP tools
- File writes now include a bounded diff preview and path-boundary validation
- High-risk tool actions require explicit approval unless allowed by chat/project/global policy
- Added regression tests for event logging, protocol repair, safety classification, and high-risk approval behavior
